mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews (user_id, product_id, order_item_id, rating, content) VALUES (#{user_id}, #{product_id}, #{order_item_id}, #{rating}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, p.name product_name, p.image_s FROM reviews r JOIN products p ON r.product_id = p.product_id WHERE r.review_id = #{review_id}
SELECT r.*, p.name product_name, p.image_s FROM reviews r JOIN products p ON r.product_id = p.product_id WHERE r.user_id = #{id} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT r.*, u.name user_name, u.nick_name, p.name product_name, p.image_l FROM reviews r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.user_id JOIN products p ON r.product_id = p.product_id ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT review_id, user_id, product_id, order_item_id, rating, content, created_at FROM reviews WHERE product_id=#{value} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM reviews WHERE product_id = #{value} ORDER BY review_id DESC
